case_title: ACME BREAD COMPANY VS HOWTHVIEW, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $6,027.00 AS TO DEFENDANT O'REILLY'S HOLY GRAIL
